DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT GEORGE FLYNN'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH DEFENDANT'S DEMAND FOR INSPECTION AND RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED IN PART AND MOOT IN PART. THE MOTION IS MOOT AS RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED TO THE SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS TO COMPEL AN INSPECTION AT 30 PRADO STREET. THE PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER TO SET A DATE WITH THE INSPECTION TO TAKE PLACE NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 10, 2010. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Order
Off Calendar Apr-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LEA HYKE's Motion For Assignment Order is granted. No opposition filed. The following rights to payment of Judgment Debtor, Woodworks Window and Door Company, are hereby assigned to the judgment creditor, Lea Hyke, until such time as the judgment herein is fully satisfied or this order is amended: accounts receivable/payments due from (1) Bryan Michelson Construction; (2) Scott A. Meadows; (3) Pacific Ridge Construction; (4) Justin Farrelly, Inc.; and (5) McMullen Brothers Inc. The aforementioned third parties shall pay the subject accounts receivables/payments to judgment creditor Lea Hyke c/o Sweet & Walker, P.C., 6073 Mission Street, Daly City, California 94014, to be applied to the judgment herein until such judgment is fully satisfied or this order is amended. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Notice Of Motion And Moiton For Order Compelling Compliance With Defts Demand For Inspection, Deft'S Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Linda Lawny, Esq., for defendant and moving party: George Flynn

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT GEORGE FLYNN'S Motion To Compel Compliance With Defendant's Demand For Inspection And Responses To Special Interrogatories is granted in part and moot in part. The motion is moot as responses have been served to the Special Interrogatories. The motion is granted as it seeks to compel an inspection at 30 Prado Street. The parties shall meet and confer to set a date with the inspection to take place no later than September 10, 2010. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT WOODWORKS WINDOW & DOOR COMPANY INC. and ELLIOTT WEISS's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions is granted. The responses are incomplete as they fail to specify those portions of the requests that are admitted and which portions of the requests that are denied. Further responses shall be given within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
